description: Statistical weighting factors for survey data
Detailed income components at individual level
DDL:
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS FACT_INDIVIDUAL_INCOME_COMPONENTS CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE FACT_INDIVIDUAL_INCOME_COMPONENTS (
	INDIVIDUAL_INCOME_COMPONENTS_ID BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,
	UNIQUE_PERSON_ID BIGINT,
	INDIVIDUAL_OTHER_HOUSEHOLD_INCOME DOUBLE PRECISION,
	INCOME_NON_AGRICULTURAL_WAGE BIGINT,
	INCOME_FARM_WAGE BIGINT,
	INCOME_SALARY_POSITION BIGINT,
	INCOME_NREGA BIGINT,
	INCOME_NON_AGRICULTURAL_WAGE_NOT_NREGA BIGINT
);

description: Income from property, pensions, and passive sources
